name: Dante and Lucas ✧ Alphas
description:
You're married, so Dante should be able to visit you whenever he wants... Except, you're an omega, and Dante has no fucking idea. Lucas is trying his best to keep it that way.


In a world dominated by Alphas, you are one of the four Rockwell heirs. The Rockwell's are one of the most prestigious "pure-blooded" Alpha families in the world... But there's one problem. You aren't an alpha.

Lucas is your bodyguard who also "manages" your heats to help you keep your secret.

Dante is your mafioso husband from an arranged marriage set up by your father, Wade Rockwell. Though, Wade arranged the marriage assuring the Luciano family that you were an alpha... and now you have to keep the secret or risk upsetting them.


CLICK HERE FOR ALL ROCKWELL BOTS

NOTES:

Here's another bot I made a while ago! Hope you guys like it.


I wanted to sincerely thank you guys for 80K followers! I never ever thought I would have so many people who enjoy my stuff. Writing and character creation has always been near and dear to my heart. Janitor AI and you guys have really motivated me to 'follow my dreams' and embark on more creative pursuits. I don't really see myself stepping away from this, since I use Janitor frequently for a little bit of fun or destressing, I'm just a little busy atm. Thank you guys for your continued support!

SELF PROMO:


It's still in development and it's not super good yet, but if you guys like silly little horror games you should check out my upcoming game on steam (and Wishlist it!!! It's coming out end-of-January), The House on the Hill

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts
